concerns.text: Task T015 (Implement LatinSquareCounterbalancer) is listed in Phase 2 (Foundational) but depends on the completion of T012e (integrate counterbalancing into Streamlit), which resides in Phase 3. This creates a dependency violation – a consumer task preceding its producer.

Task T019 (Implement raw data logging) depends on T019b (Generate session schema), but the schema generation is also in Phase 2, creating a potential race condition if T019b isn't completed before T019. While both are marked [P], ensuring schema availability *before* logging begins is critical.

Task T012d (Implement Streamlit app logic) lists dependencies on T010, T011, T012c, T013b, and T015. This is a long dependency chain; consider if some of these can be partially implemented or moved earlier to enable faster progress.

Task T012e (Integrate XAI Overlay and Counterbalancing) has dependencies on T013b and T015, but also implicitly depends on the completion of T012d (Streamlit app logic). This dependency should be explicitly stated for clarity.
